message:
fix(pages): check all wrangler config paths and handle refresh tokens

The wrangler config file location varies by version/platform:
- ~/.wrangler/config/default.toml (wrangler v3+)
- ~/.config/.wrangler/config/default.toml (some installations)
- $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/.wrangler/config/default.toml

The previous fix only checked one path. Also, an expired oauth_token
with a refresh_token present should still be considered valid since
wrangler auto-refreshes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
